description: Use this API to change the identifier of the specified fixed bus shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = mbidshunt(ibus, id, idnew)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus to which the shunt id is connected. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Present shunt identifier of the shunt for which the identifier is to be changed. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: idnew
parameters.description: New identifier to be assigned to the shunt. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: shunt ID at bus IBUS not found.
shunt ID at bus IBUS already exists.
a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
